configuration/auto-workflow.title: Auto Workflow
configuration/auto-workflow.description: Auto Workflow automates the full order processing pipeline so you don't have to manually confirm, invoice, and ship each order.

configuration/order-configuration.title: Order Configuration
configuration/order-configuration.description: Configure how Shopify orders are imported and processed in Odoo.

configuration/payment-gateway.title: Payment Gateway
configuration/payment-gateway.description: Map Shopify payment gateways to Odoo accounting journals for correct financial recording.

configuration/product-configuration.title: Product Configuration
configuration/product-configuration.description: Configure how products sync between Shopify and Odoo.

configuration/stock-information.title: Stock Information
configuration/stock-information.description: Configure how inventory levels sync between Shopify locations and Odoo warehouses.

configuration/tax-configuration.title: Tax Configuration
configuration/tax-configuration.description: Map Shopify taxes to Odoo fiscal positions and tax rules.

configuration/webhook-configuration.title: Webhook Configuration
configuration/webhook-configuration.description: Webhooks enable real-time sync between Shopify and Odoo. When an event occurs in Shopify (new order, updated product, etc.), Shopify instantly notifies Odoo.

installation/configure-instance.title: Configure Instance
installation/configure-instance.description: After entering your Shopify credentials, configure the sync settings for your Odoo instance.

installation/generate-api-keys.title: Generate API Keys
installation/generate-api-keys.description: To connect Odoo with Shopify, you need to create a Custom App in Shopify and obtain API credentials.

installation/getting-started.title: Getting Started
installation/getting-started.description: This guide walks you through the complete installation of the SDLC Corp Shopify–Odoo Connector.

installation/setup-connector.title: Setup Connector
installation/setup-connector.description: After installing the module, configure the Shopify store connection in Odoo.

intro.title: Welcome to SDLC Corp Docs
intro.description: Welcome to the official documentation for the SDLC Corp Shopify–Odoo Connector — enterprise-grade real-time integration between Shopify and Odoo ERP.

operations/auto-scheduler.title: Auto Scheduler
operations/auto-scheduler.description: The connector includes pre-configured scheduled actions for regular background sync.

operations/import-customer.title: Import Customers
operations/import-customer.description: Sync your Shopify customers into Odoo contacts.

operations/import-location.title: Import Locations
operations/import-location.description: Import your Shopify fulfilment locations into Odoo for warehouse mapping.

operations/queue-management.title: Queue Management
operations/queue-management.description: The connector uses an async queue system for reliable, retryable processing of all sync operations.

orders/cancel-order-shopify.title: Cancel Order in Shopify
orders/cancel-order-shopify.description: Cancel a Shopify order from within Odoo.

orders/export-shipment.title: Export Shipment Tracking
orders/export-shipment.description: Push tracking numbers from Odoo delivery orders back to Shopify to mark orders as fulfilled.

orders/grant-access-shipment.title: Grant Fulfillment Access
orders/grant-access-shipment.description: Grant shipping access to allow the connector to export tracking numbers back to Shopify.

orders/import-cancel-order.title: Import Cancel Orders
orders/import-cancel-order.description: Sync cancelled orders from Shopify to Odoo.

orders/import-returns.title: Import Returns
orders/import-returns.description: Import product returns from Shopify into Odoo as return transfers.

orders/import-shipped-orders.title: Import Shipped Orders
orders/import-shipped-orders.description: Import already-fulfilled orders from Shopify — useful for historical imports or catch-up syncs.

orders/import-specific-order.title: Import Specific Order
orders/import-specific-order.description: Import a single order by its Shopify Order ID.

orders/import-unshipped-orders.title: Import Unshipped Orders
orders/import-unshipped-orders.description: Import all open, unpaid or unshipped orders from Shopify.

orders/refund.title: Process Refunds
orders/refund.description: Process full or partial refunds for Shopify orders.

products/export-stock.title: Export Stock to Shopify
products/export-stock.description: Push current Odoo inventory levels to Shopify.

products/import-products.title: Import Products
products/import-products.description: Import all products from your Shopify store into Odoo.

products/import-specific-products.title: Import Specific Products
products/import-specific-products.description: Import one or more specific products by their Shopify Product ID.

products/import-stock.title: Import Stock from Shopify
products/import-stock.description: Pull inventory levels from Shopify into Odoo.

products/map-products.title: Map Products
products/map-products.description: Link existing Odoo products to their Shopify equivalents without re-importing.

products/update-products.title: Update Products
products/update-products.description: Push product changes from Odoo back to Shopify.

reference/faq.title: FAQ
reference/faq.description: Does the connector work with Shopify Plus?

reports/net-profit-report.title: Net Profit Report
reports/net-profit-report.description: Analyze profitability of your Shopify sales directly in Odoo.

reports/sales-report.title: Sales Report
reports/sales-report.description: View consolidated sales data from your Shopify stores directly in Odoo.

reports/shopify-payouts.title: Shopify Payouts
reports/shopify-payouts.description: Import Shopify Payments payout data into Odoo for reconciliation.

reports/webhooks-configuration.title: Webhook Logs & Activity
reports/webhooks-configuration.description: Monitor incoming webhook events from Shopify in real time.
